text: 4108 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ رَهَنَ عِنْدَ رَجُلٍ دَاراً فَاحْتَرَقَتْ أَوِ اِنْهَدَمَتْ قَالَ "يَكُونُ مَالُهُ فِي تُرْبَةِ اَلْأَرْضِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4108 - Imam (as) said regarding a man who pledged a house as security with another man, and the house either burned down or collapsed: "His wealth remains in the soil of the land."
